title: Nutty Fluffy American Duck Stir-fry
description: A festive duck dish featuring a nutty flavor profile with low-fat-friendly options to make it suitable for various dietary needs.
instructions: Season the duck fillets with salt and pepper. Place them on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Roast in the preheated oven for about 12-15 minutes or until cooked through (internal temperature of 140°F).
While the duck is cooking, mix together soy sauce, ginger paste, garlic paste, and optional oyster sauce in a small bowl. Set aside.
Remove the duck from the oven, let it rest for 5 minutes then slice into thin strips.
Heat vegetable oil in a wok or large skillet over medium-high heat. Add sliced nuts and stir-fry until they start to turn golden brown.
Add the sliced duck to the pan and pour the sauce over them, tossing well to coat evenly.
Reduce heat to low, cover the pan with a lid, and let it simmer for about 2 minutes to thicken the sauce slightly.
Serve hot as a main course or side dish with steamed vegetables.
